metadata.description: ES: Marketplace comunitario del plugin abogado-del-diablo — una skill que vuelve a Claude en tu contra para criticar a fondo una idea o un proyecto entero, sin validar ni suavizar, y entregar un veredicto con qué arreglar primero. EN: Community marketplace for the abogado-del-diablo plugin — a devil's-advocate skill that turns Claude against you to harshly critique an idea or whole project.

plugins.name: abogado-del-diablo
plugins.description: Devil's advocate skill: turns Claude against you to harshly critique an idea, plan, pitch, or whole project across eight angles (assumptions, market, competition, viability, numbers, execution, pre-mortem, blind spot), researches real failures, and returns a blunt verdict with a prioritized fix list. No validation, no hedging.
plugins.author: Hainrixz
